sentences.target: In Wirklichkeit ist es gar nicht teuer.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t ɪst ɛs ɡaːɐ̯ nɪçt ˈtɔɪ̯ɐ/

translations.de: In Wirklichkeit ist es gar nicht teuer.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t ɪst ɛs ɡaːɐ̯ nɪçt ˈtɔɪ̯ɐ/
translations.es: En realidad no es nada caro.
translations.fr: En fait, ce n'est pas cher du tout.
translations.it: In realtà non è affatto caro.
translations.ru: На самом деле это совсем недорого.
translations.pt: Na verdade, não é nada caro.
translations.vi: Thực ra thì không hề đắt.
translations.ar: في الواقع، ليس غاليًا على الإطلاق.
translations.nl: Eigenlijk is het helemaal niet duur.
translations.hi: असल में यह बिल्कुल महंगा नहीं है.
translations.pl: Tak naprawdę wcale nie jest drogo.
translations.el: Στην πραγματικότητα δεν είναι καθόλου ακριβό.
translations.nb: Egentlig er det ikke dyrt i det hele tatt.
translations.sv: Egentligen är det inte alls dyrt.
translations.ro: De fapt, nu e deloc scump.
translations.cs: Ve skutečnosti to vůbec není drahé.
translations.da: Egentlig er det slet ikke dyrt.
translations.fi: Oikeasti se ei ole yhtään kallis.
translations.ja: 実はそんなに高くない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase; here used with a static meaning and takes the dative ('In Wirklichkeit' = 'in reality').
Feminine noun in dative singular as the complement of 'in'; the PP functions as a sentence-level adverbial ('in reality').
Finite copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, linking the subject 'es' to the predicative adjective 'teuer'.
Neuter personal pronoun functioning as the grammatical subject.
Intensifying adverb typically used with negation; strengthens 'nicht' to mean 'not at all'.
Negation particle; combines with 'gar' to form the emphatic negative 'gar nicht'.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Die Wirklichkeit holt mich nach dem Urlaub ein.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t hoːlt mɪç naːx deːm ˈuːɐ̯laʊ̯p aɪ̯n/

translations.de: Die Wirklichkeit holt mich nach dem Urlaub ein.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t hoːlt mɪç naːx deːm ˈuːɐ̯laʊ̯p aɪ̯n/
translations.en: Reality catches up with me after vacation.
translations.es: Después de las vacaciones, la realidad me alcanza.
translations.fr: Après les vacances, la réalité me rattrape.
translations.it: Dopo le vacanze, la realtà mi piomba addosso.
translations.zh-Hans: 假期结束后，现实很快就找上门来。
translations.yue: 放完假之後，現實好快就追上嚟。
translations.pt: Depois das férias, a realidade me alcança.
translations.vi: Sau kỳ nghỉ, thực tế ập đến.
translations.nl: Na de vakantie haalt de realiteit me in.
translations.hu: A nyaralás után utolér a valóság.
translations.hi: छुट्टी के बाद हकीकत मुझे घेर लेती है.
translations.el: Μετά τις διακοπές, η πραγματικότητα με προλαβαίνει.
translations.nb: Etter ferien tar virkeligheten meg igjen.
translations.sv: Efter semestern kommer verkligheten ikapp mig.
translations.ro: După vacanță, realitatea mă ajunge din urmă.
translations.fi: Loman jälkeen todellisuus ottaa minut kiinni.
translations.ja: 休み明けに現実に引き戻される。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular, marking the subject noun.
Feminine noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; together with the separable particle 'ein' forms the verb 'einholen' ('to catch up with').
1st person singular pronoun in accusative; direct object of 'einholen'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article in dative singular, agreeing with 'Urlaub'; part of the PP headed by 'nach'.
Masculine noun in dative singular as the object of 'nach'; temporal modifier.
Separable verbal particle placed at clause end in a main clause; completes the verb 'einholen'.

sentences.target: Ich komme heute mit der Wirklichkeit klar.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɔmə ˈhɔʏ̯tə mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t klaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich komme heute mit der Wirklichkeit klar.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɔmə ˈhɔʏ̯tə mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t klaːɐ̯/
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'arrive à gérer la réalité.
translations.it: Oggi riesco a gestire la realtà.
translations.pt: Hoje consigo lidar com a realidade.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đối phó được với thực tế.
translations.nl: Vandaag kan ik de realiteit aan.
translations.hi: आज मैं हकीकत से निपटने में सक्षम हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα καταφέρνω με την πραγματικότητα.
translations.id: Hari ini aku bisa menghadapi kenyataan.
translations.sv: I dag klarar jag av verkligheten.
translations.da: I dag kan jeg godt klare virkeligheden.
translations.ja: 今日は現実にちゃんと向き合える。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; combines with the separable particle 'klar' to form 'klarkommen' ('to cope/manage').
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces the complement specifying the entity one copes with.
Definite article in dative feminine singular, agreeing with 'Wirklichkeit'; within the PP headed by 'mit'.
Feminine noun in dative singular as the object of 'mit'; complements the verb phrase.
Separable verbal particle occurring clause-final in a main clause; completes the verb 'klarkommen' ('to cope').

sentences.target: Das Foto zeigt die Wirklichkeit ohne Filter.
sentences.reading: /das ˈfoːto tsaɪ̯kt diː ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t ˈoːnə ˈfɪltɐ/

translations.de: Das Foto zeigt die Wirklichkeit ohne Filter.
translations.ipa: /das ˈfoːto tsaɪ̯kt diː ˈvɪʁklɪçkaɪ̯t ˈoːnə ˈfɪltɐ/
translations.en: The photo shows reality without a filter.
translations.es: La foto muestra la realidad sin filtros.
translations.fr: La photo montre la réalité sans filtre.
translations.it: La foto mostra la realtà senza filtri.
translations.ko: 이 사진은 필터 없이 현실을 보여줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这张照片不加滤镜地呈现现实。
translations.yue: 呢張相冇加濾鏡直接呈現現實。
translations.pt: A foto mostra a realidade sem filtros.
translations.he: התמונה מציגה את המציאות בלי פילטר.
translations.vi: Bức ảnh cho thấy thực tế không qua bộ lọc.
translations.ar: تظهر الصورة الواقع من دون أي فلتر.
translations.nl: De foto laat de werkelijkheid zonder filter zien.
translations.hu: A fotó szűrők nélkül mutatja a valóságot.
translations.hi: तस्वीर हकीकत को बिना किसी फ़िल्टर के दिखाती है.
translations.el: Η φωτογραφία δείχνει την πραγματικότητα χωρίς φίλτρα.
translations.id: Foto itu menampilkan kenyataan tanpa filter.
translations.ja: この写真は現実をフィルターなしで写している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter singular, introducing the subject noun.
Neuter noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive verb taking 'die Wirklichkeit' as direct object.
Definite article in accusative feminine singular, marking the object noun.
Feminine noun in accusative singular; direct object of 'zeigt'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a manner/instrumental-like PP.
Masculine noun in accusative singular as the object of 'ohne'; specifies 'without filter'.
